_note: IMEI TAC (Type Allocation Code = first 8 digits of the IMEI) -> {make, model}. These entries are VERIFIED against public TAC databases (imei.info / hicelltek / GSMA-cited examples). The full GSMA/Osmocom TAC DB has 100k+ devices; this is a curated set of common models. Note each phone model has MANY TACs (variants/regions), so a non-match does not mean 'not that model' — it returns null. To get full coverage, drop the Osmocom 'tacdb' (CC-BY-SA, ~261k devices) into app/data/imei_tac_full.json as {"<8-digit-tac>": {"make": "..", "model": ".."}, ...} and it is merged over this seed at startup.
